rows.label: tev014301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev014301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Connor about Soul Voices.

rows.label: tev014301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev014301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Connor about recent developments.

rows.label: tev014301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Connor for some combat tips.

rows.label: tev014301_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Connor about the Overeds
of Primordial Wilderness.

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0001
rows.name:
I was attacked by an Overed while patrolling
around the city's exterior walls![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0002
rows.name:
It destroyed my Doll, knocked Monica
unconscious, and critically wounded me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Then, when we were at the brink of being
wiped out, our team leader shouted, "Target
its weak spot!" in a booming voice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0004
rows.name:
With a burst of adrenaline, I leapt at the Overed!
I felt an unbelievable amount of power welling up
inside me, and I knocked it down in one swing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I almost can't believe it really happened. It
was like my leader's voice got me through the
crisis and filled me with renewed vigor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hey, thanks for finding my comm
device! Because of you, I was
able to make it back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0009
rows.name:
My sister and my team leader escorted me
back, but not before my dear sister greeted
me with a slap right across the face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Then I spent the walk home being lectured by the team
leader. In retrospect, being stranded was a lot more
pleasant than being rescued turned out to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's not really my style to
look before I leap, but I'm
gonna try to be more careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0012
rows.name:
I just don't want to make
them worry about me again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0015
rows.name:
First it was that Growth squid woman, then it
was the tainted from Nightglow Forest. It's just
one monster after another around this joint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0016
rows.name:
But as dangerous as they appear, they all seem
to either use overly specialized attacks or have
some sort of surprisingly severe weakness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0017
rows.name:
In the former situation, you can just
use equipment with attributes that protect
against their specialized attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0018
rows.name:
And in the latter situation, you can strike at their
weak spots, or take advantage of their other
vulnerabilities, to defeat them with surprising ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Of course, this is all just armchair strategizing.
If I ever faced a foe like that in real life, I'd
probably crap my pants and run like hell.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0025
rows.name:
It's true that the Beasts' Lair
area just north of NLA is quite
dangerous by local standards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Apparently all the indigens
there are led by a single grex.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0027
rows.name:
If we could take it down, it would
significantly decrease the danger level
outside the city's walls as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0028
rows.name:
But the darn thing has already fought
off numerous Interceptor already.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014301_MSG0029
rows.name:
So if you ever encounter that grex
yourself, don't get any crazy ideas.
Just turn around and run for it![ST:wait ]
